tasks.subject: Task 0: Author all roadmap docs, decision records, and milestone updates
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create every roadmap file, epic file, decision-log entry, and milestone update required by this plan, in a single commit, before any GitHub state changes.

**Files:**
- Create 11 task .md files under docs/roadmap/tasks/ (AW-257, AW-259..AW-268)
- Create 2 epic .md files under docs/roadmap/epics/ (M5-F, M5-G)
- Modify docs/roadmap/milestones/M4-nightcap-experience-layer.md (append Closure section)
- Modify docs/roadmap/milestones/M5-hardening-proof-prerequisites.md (add M5-F + M5-G)
- Modify docs/product/decisions-log.csv (append D-064..D-067)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 11 task .md files and 2 epic .md files exist matching established roadmap formats
- M4 milestone has Closure section listing AW-257, AW-259, AW-260, AW-261
- M5 milestone lists M5-F and M5-G
- 4 new decision-log rows present
- No em dashes, no secrets, LF line endings

**Verify:** `git status --short && python -c "import csv; rows=list(csv.reader(open('docs/product/decisions-log.csv'))); print(f'Decision count: {len(rows)-1}')"`

See plan file section Task 0 for full step-by-step content of each new file.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/roadmap/tasks/AW-257-promote-crime-scene-smash-and-evidence-locker.md", "docs/roadmap/tasks/AW-259-rehearsal-1-m4-exit.md", "docs/roadmap/tasks/AW-260-founder-rehearsal-runbook-and-blocker-log.md", "docs/roadmap/tasks/AW-261-adr-0003-cloudflare-vs-gcp-validation-decision.md", "docs/roadmap/tasks/AW-262-tmst-package-authoring-and-schema-resolution.md", "docs/roadmap/tasks/AW-263-tmst-runtime-social-truth-bluff-mechanic.md", "docs/roadmap/tasks/AW-264-tmst-api-events-and-sdk.md", "docs/roadmap/tasks/AW-265-tmst-web-rendering-four-phases.md", "docs/roadmap/tasks/AW-266-rehearsal-2-tmst-real-human-session.md", "docs/roadmap/tasks/AW-267-nightcap-art-direction-brief.md", "docs/roadmap/tasks/AW-268-nightcap-asset-pipeline-and-motion-system.md", "docs/roadmap/epics/M5-F-tell-me-something-true-social-opener.md", "docs/roadmap/epics/M5-G-nightcap-visual-identity-and-polish.md", "docs/roadmap/milestones/M4-nightcap-experience-layer.md", "docs/roadmap/milestones/M5-hardening-proof-prerequisites.md", "docs/product/decisions-log.csv"], "verifyCommand": "git diff HEAD~1 --stat", "acceptanceCriteria": ["11 task .md files exist", "2 epic .md files exist", "M4 milestone has Closure section", "M5 milestone lists M5-F and M5-G", "4 new decision-log rows"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Create GitHub issues and backfill manifest
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create 13 new GitHub issues (11 tasks + 2 epics), update docs/roadmap/index.json with new task/epic entries + GitHub issue numbers, bump manifest version to 1.3.

**Files:**
- Modify docs/roadmap/index.json

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 13 new GitHub issues exist with correct labels (task + size:X + M4/M5 or Epic + M5) and milestones
- AW-259 issue body links to AW-257, AW-260, AW-261, #148, #84 as sub-issues
- index.json validates and has all 11 task entries + 2 epic entries with github.issue_number set
- Manifest version bumped to 1.3

**Verify:** `gh issue list --repo nickejanssen/arcwright --label M4 --state open --limit 20 && jq '.tasks[] | select(.id | test("AW-25[7-9]|AW-26[0-8]")) | {id, github}' docs/roadmap/index.json`

See plan file section Task 1 for exact gh issue create commands and manifest entry schema.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/roadmap/index.json"], "verifyCommand": "python -m json.tool docs/roadmap/index.json > /dev/null && gh issue list --repo nickejanssen/arcwright --label M4 --state open --limit 20", "acceptanceCriteria": ["13 new GitHub issues exist", "index.json validates", "all 11 task entries have github.issue_number set"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Repurpose #148 (AW-254) and #84 (AW-231) bodies
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rewrite GitHub issue bodies for #148 and #84 to repurposed scope and update corresponding docs/roadmap/tasks/ files.

**Files:**
- Modify docs/roadmap/tasks/AW-254-first-production-nightcap-mini-game.md
- Modify docs/roadmap/tasks/AW-231-m4-real-human-rehearsal.md
- GitHub issue body #148 (via gh issue edit)
- GitHub issue body #84 (via gh issue edit)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- AW-254 task .md has repurposed scope (verify two promoted games) preserving original criteria PLUS dual-game coverage
- AW-231 task .md has repurposed scope (execute Rehearsal 1) preserving original criteria PLUS runbook reference + triage discipline
- GitHub issue #148 body matches updated AW-254 .md
- GitHub issue #84 body matches updated AW-231 .md
- Both issues comment-linked to AW-259 as parent

**Verify:** `gh issue view 148 --repo nickejanssen/arcwright | head -50 && gh issue view 84 --repo nickejanssen/arcwright | head -50`

See plan file section Task 2 for full task file rewrites.


tasks.subject: Task 3: AW-261 — Record ADR-0003 Cloudflare vs GCP validation decision
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Close ADR-0003 validation gate by recording the Cloudflare vs GCP comparison, appending real D-067 rationale, and filing a follow-on M5 cloud-deploy task (AW-269).

**Files:**
- Modify docs/decisions/0003-nightcap-web-experience-runtime.md (Status + Validation Outcome section)
- Modify docs/product/decisions-log.csv (replace D-067 placeholder with real outcome)
- Create docs/roadmap/tasks/AW-269-nightcap-cloud-deploy.md
- Modify docs/roadmap/index.json (add AW-269)
- Create AW-269 GitHub issue

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ADR-0003 status moves from 'Accepted with validation gate' to 'Accepted, validation complete'
- ADR-0003 has Validation Outcome (AW-261, 2026-06-26) section with comparison + chosen path + rationale
- D-067 row has real rationale (not placeholder)
- AW-269 task .md exists with established format
- AW-269 GitHub issue exists with labels task,size:L,M5 and milestone M5
- index.json has AW-269 entry with github.issue_number

**Verify:** `grep -E 'Status.*Accepted, validation complete' docs/decisions/0003-nightcap-web-experience-runtime.md && grep AW-269 docs/roadmap/index.json`

See plan file section Task 3 for full ADR section content and AW-269 task body.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/decisions/0003-nightcap-web-experience-runtime.md", "docs/product/decisions-log.csv", "docs/roadmap/tasks/AW-269-nightcap-cloud-deploy.md", "docs/roadmap/index.json"], "verifyCommand": "grep -E 'Status.*Accepted, validation complete' docs/decisions/0003-nightcap-web-experience-runtime.md && grep AW-269 docs/roadmap/index.json && python -m json.tool docs/roadmap/index.json > /dev/null", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ADR-0003 status updated", "D-067 row updated with real outcome", "AW-269 task .md created", "AW-269 GitHub issue created", "manifest backfilled"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: AW-257 — Promote Crime Scene Smash and Evidence Locker to active
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** This task was requested by the user in the current conversation. It MUST NOT be closed by walking around it, by declaring it 'verified inline', or by substituting a cheaper check. Close only after every item in acceptanceCriteria has been re-validated independently, with output captured.

**Goal:** Fill Crime Scene Smash copy placeholders, run AW-250 safety review on both games, promote both manifests to lifecycle:active, bind both into nightcap/arc.json at founder-chosen beats.

**Files:**
- Modify nightcap/mini_games/crime-scene-smash/definitions/0.1.0.json (replace 5 copy placeholders)
- Modify nightcap/mini_games/crime-scene-smash/manifest.json (lifecycle draft → active)
- Modify nightcap/mini_games/evidence-locker-402/manifest.json (lifecycle playtest → active)
- Modify nightcap/arc.json (bind both packages at founder-chosen beats)
- Modify docs/product/decisions-log.csv (update D-062 to include Evidence Locker)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Crime Scene Smash JSON has no '[final authored copy needed]' strings
- Both packages validate against AW-249 schema and loader
- Both packages pass AW-250 safety review
- Founder signs off on Crime Scene Smash copy in PR comment before merge (USER GATE: explicit 'approved' from nickejanssen)
- Both manifests at lifecycle:active
- Both packages bound in nightcap/arc.json at founder-named beats
- D-062 row updated to include Evidence Locker

**Verify:** `python -c "import json; m1=json.load(open('nightcap/mini_games/crime-scene-smash/manifest.json')); m2=json.load(open('nightcap/mini_games/evidence-locker-402/manifest.json')); assert m1['lifecycle']=='active' and m2['lifecycle']=='active'; print('OK')" && grep -L 'final authored copy needed' nightcap/mini_games/crime-scene-smash/definitions/0.1.0.json && pytest engine/tests/ -k 'mini_game or arc' -v`

See plan file section Task 4 for the 10 detailed steps including copy drafting guidance, safety review process, and founder-approval gate procedure.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["nightcap/mini_games/crime-scene-smash/definitions/0.1.0.json", "nightcap/mini_games/crime-scene-smash/manifest.json", "nightcap/mini_games/evidence-locker-402/manifest.json", "nightcap/arc.json", "docs/product/decisions-log.csv"], "verifyCommand": "python -c \"import json; m1=json.load(open('nightcap/mini_games/crime-scene-smash/manifest.json')); m2=json.load(open('nightcap/mini_games/evidence-locker-402/manifest.json')); assert m1['lifecycle']=='active' and m2['lifecycle']=='active'; print('OK')\" && grep -L 'final authored copy needed' nightcap/mini_games/crime-scene-smash/definitions/0.1.0.json && pytest engine/tests/ -k 'mini_game or arc' -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Crime Scene Smash copy placeholders replaced and founder-approved", "both packages validate against schema", "both packages pass safety review", "both manifests at lifecycle active", "both packages bound in nightcap/arc.json at founder-chosen beats", "D-062 updated to include Evidence Locker"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.description:

tasks.subject: Task 7: AW-231 — Execute Real-Human Nightcap Rehearsal 1
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** This task was requested by the user in the current conversation. It MUST NOT be closed by walking around it, by declaring it 'verified inline', or by substituting a cheaper check. Close only after every item in acceptanceCriteria has been re-validated independently, with output captured.

**Goal:** Founder runs the actual rehearsal with at least 3 invitees following the AW-260 runbook. Executing chat is coordinator/scribe — captures blockers and triages them into new GitHub issues. Founder completes the rehearsal, not the chat.

**Files:**
- Create docs/roadmap/operations/rehearsal-1-artifacts/blockers-<YYYYMMDD>.md
- Create docs/roadmap/operations/rehearsal-1-artifacts/session-<YYYYMMDD>.json
- Create zero or more new GitHub issues for triaged blockers
- Modify docs/roadmap/index.json (set M4 milestone status to 'complete' only after every blocker triaged)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Rehearsal occurred with founder + at least 3 invitees on real devices
- Blocker log file exists with one entry per observed blocker (or 'no blockers observed')
- Session export JSON archived
- Every blocker entry has a new GitHub issue with appropriate milestone label (M5 hardening, M5-G polish, M6 ops, or wontfix)
- Every blocker entry's 'New issue link' field is filled
- M4 milestone status set to 'complete' in manifest

**Verify:** `ls docs/roadmap/operations/rehearsal-1-artifacts/ && grep -c '^### Blocker' docs/roadmap/operations/rehearsal-1-artifacts/blockers-*.md && jq '.milestones[] | select(.id=="M4") | .status' docs/roadmap/index.json`

See plan file section Task 7 for triage procedure and M4 closure steps.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/roadmap/operations/rehearsal-1-artifacts/", "docs/roadmap/index.json"], "verifyCommand": "ls docs/roadmap/operations/rehearsal-1-artifacts/ && grep -c '^### Blocker' docs/roadmap/operations/rehearsal-1-artifacts/blockers-*.md && jq '.milestones[] | select(.id==\"M4\") | .status' docs/roadmap/index.json", "acceptanceCriteria": ["rehearsal occurred with 4+ humans", "blocker log archived", "session export archived", "every blocker has a triage GitHub issue", "M4 status set to complete"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requireEvidenceTokens": [["pre-flight", "preflight"], ["session-complete", "session-end", "wrap"], ["triaged", "blockers-filed"]], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
